name: Settings
description: user_prefs (per-user, owner-scoped settings) and feature_flags (instance-level toggles) per docs/upgrade-and-customization.md Rule 5. Effective flag value = user override (a user_prefs key of "flag:<name>") -> instance feature_flags value, resolved by GET /api/flags. Also ai_prices: instance-level, live-editable per-model AI pricing that object_ai's cost recording looks up instead of hardcoding.
